name: Science Communication
student_summary: Translate research into stories the public understands.
overview: Translate research into stories the public understands. Science Communication sits in the Applied Sciences family of Science & Research. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You express yourself best in writing
Explaining things so others finally get it satisfies you
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply science writing to real problems
Collaborate with your team using visual explanation
Keep improving at interviewing — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Applied Sciences foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Science Communication is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of visual explanation
projects: Beginner: explore science writing with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Writing tools
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Journalism: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Content Creation & New Media: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Teaching (School): build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Science Communication pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹12 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Any Science, English. Typical degrees: Science degree + journalism/communication training. Alternatives exist: integrated bs-ms at iisers.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Science Communication evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Science Communication is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
